description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly light gray upper with vibrant pink laces and accents. The shoe has a visible Nike Swoosh logo on both sides, and the midsole is highlighted by a turquoise blue band that wraps around the base. The collar is padded and extends above the ankle for added support, while the tongue is thick and quilted, providing comfort and a secure fit. The outsole appears to be made of durable rubber with a textured grip, and the heel includes a pull tab for easy wearing. Subtle mesh panels and synthetic overlays contribute to both breathability and structural integrity.
description: A high-top athletic sneaker in light gray with pink laces, turquoise accents, and a visible Nike Swoosh logo. Features a padded collar, quilted tongue, and durable rubber sole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pink laces, padded tongue, and toe box with turquoise trim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the Nike Swoosh, mesh panel, and turquoise midsole band.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded heel, pull tab, and subtle logo on the heel counter.
description_view_3: Right side view with another Nike Swoosh, mesh panel, and full profile of the midsole and outsole.
attribute_logo: Nike Swoosh on both sides in white; small 'LJ' logo on heel tab in pink and gray
